name: bounding-box
title: BoundingBox
description: A UI annotation bounding box — a rectangle outline that strokes itself on like a selection marquee around a region, with optional corner ticks and an optional label tag pinned to the top-left corner. For highlighting a UI element in docs and tutorial videos; the accent is earned here.
pickWhen: framing a region in a UI demo — "this is the area we're talking about." Use `callout` to point at a single spot instead.
